scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w shared && npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w client
scripts.android:build:debug: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server && npm run android:build:debug -w client
scripts.android:build:ngrok: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server && npm run android:build:ngrok -w client
